name: Raffles Christian School Jakarta

campuses.name: Main Campus
campuses.address: Jl. Gedung Hijau Raya I No. 1, Pondok Indah, Jakarta Selatan 12310, Indonesia

intelligence.verdict: Parents in the Christian expat and Indonesian community tend to know Raffles as a solid mid-range Cambridge option with strong values.
paragraphs: Parents in the Christian expat and Indonesian community tend to know Raffles as a solid mid-range Cambridge option with strong values.

fees.note: Approximate annual fee range: US$4.9K – US$24K. Contact the school for the full fee schedule and payment options.

paragraphs: Diverse international and local student body. Contact the school for current enrolment details.
Facilities include: Multiple campuses, Science laboratories, Computer labs, Libraries, Sports facilities.
